name: anyshift
description: Public Claude Code plugins maintained by Anyshift: skills for the Annie CLI and the Anyshift MCP server, plus future SRE methodology skills.

plugins.name: annie-skills
plugins.description: Teaches an agent how to drive the Annie CLI and the Anyshift MCP server: install + auth, the 5 read-only tools (get_resource_graph, get_recent_changes, get_dependents, get_blast_radius, get_temporal_diff), worked examples, and failure modes.
